name: Pink Lavender Lemonade
recipeInstructions: Combine 2 1/2 cups water, sugar and dried pink hibiscus flowers or hulled strawberries in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve the sugar. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes to extract the pink color from the flowers. Remove from heat and stir in chopped fresh lavender leaves. Cover and let cool. Strain the cooled herb liquid into a large pitcher or jar (if using strawberries, gently press juice from the berries). Add the remaining 2 1/2 cups water and lemon juice. Stir well. If desired, add an additional 1/2 cup sugar. Just before serving, stir in ice cubes. Pour into chilled glasses. Garnish with fresh lavender flowers.
